news:news.news:title: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule in Hungary ends with a significant election defeat, while global tensions rise over U.S. plans to blockade Iranian ports.
news:news.news:keywords: Hungary election results, U.S. Iran tensions, Bollywood news, Nigerian air strike, Haitian tourist tragedy

news:news.news:title: The collapse of US-Iran talks raises concerns over rising energy prices, while Texas seeks to attract investment with a new London office.
news:news.news:keywords: US-Iran energy negotiations, Texas investment strategies, US inflation trends, job market challenges in Washington DC, Bernie Sanders economic warnings

news:news.news:title: Rockstar Games confirmed a data breach with no expected impact, while the Netherlands became the first European country to approve Tesla's Full Self-Driving technology.
news:news.news:keywords: data breach impact on gaming, Tesla Full Self-Driving approval, Nintendo Switch 2 promotional offers, AI coding competition, reviews of tech gadgets

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy won his second consecutive Masters title, while Doc Rivers is leaving the Bucks and the NBA playoffs are set to begin.
news:news.news:keywords: Rory McIlroy Masters victory analysis, Doc Rivers Bucks coaching change, NBA playoffs 2026 preview, impact of injuries in sports, Kevin Garnett Timberwolves return

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into human history, health, and the universe, including Neanderthal interactions and advancements in cancer treatment.
news:news.news:keywords: Neanderthal and Homo sapiens interactions, Eating habits and weight management, Airborne toxins in the U.S., Vitamin B1 research breakthrough, Alzheimer's early detection through smell

news:news.news:title: Hungarians are voting on whether to end Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule amid ongoing tensions in Ukraine and rising political challenges in Europe.
news:news.news:keywords: Hungary elections 2026, Ukraine Easter truce, Germany far-right politics, California governor race, Iran satellite imagery restrictions

news:news.news:title: US inflation rises sharply amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, impacting various sectors including airlines and government employment.
news:news.news:keywords: US inflation impact on economy, job market challenges for federal workers, corporate responses to social issues

news:news.news:title: The Netherlands becomes the first European country to approve Tesla's supervised Full Self-Driving technology, potentially influencing wider EU adoption.
news:news.news:keywords: Tesla Full Self-Driving approval, Google News Polymarket error, Pokémon Champions launch issues, Google Nest Doorbell sale, AI art in media

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy's dramatic Saturday at the Masters sets up a competitive final round, while UFC and NCAA hockey also saw significant developments.
news:news.news:keywords: Masters Tournament final round preview, UFC event updates, NCAA hockey championship results, MLB player performance analysis, NBA postseason storylines

news:news.news:title: Recent studies reveal new insights into nutrition, cancer treatment, Alzheimer’s detection, and dark matter, highlighting significant advancements in various scientific fields.
news:news.news:keywords: nutrition and weight management, advancements in cancer treatment, Alzheimer's disease detection, dark matter research, superconductivity discoveries

news:news.news:title: Trump Threatens Hormuz Blockade as US-Iran Talks Collapse, Sparking Energy Price Fears
Hungarians Vote on Ending Orbán's 16-Year Rule as Inflation Hits US Markets Hard
